payload.description: Implement the approved Prescriber clarification from item 305259519 that SRX follows the published at-most-one-miss threshold and does not require prescriber verification for each medication. Apply the change on top of version 770575d5-b3dd-4939-a19d-64ac99fb592e so the prior prescribed-by recognition stays intact. Update both the score guidelines and the current non-champion score version with a minimal wording patch; do not broaden other Prescriber rules or change optimizer direction.
payload.title: Patch Prescriber score to reaffirm SRX at-most-one-miss rule
